name: io.github.codespar/mcp-certta
description: Certta — BR identity + signature: KYC/KYB, face match + liveness, document OCR, antifraud score, ICP-Brasil + electronic signature, orchestrated onboarding pipelines

environment_variables.name: CERTTA_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: API key from the Certta dashboard

tools.name: kyc_lookup_cpf
tools.description: Validate CPF against Receita Federal + SPC/Serasa

tools.name: kyb_lookup_cnpj
tools.description: Validate CNPJ + return corporate profile + QSA

tools.name: biometrics_face_match
tools.description: Compare selfie against document photo with liveness

tools.name: biometrics_liveness
tools.description: Passive liveness check on a selfie

tools.name: documents_ocr
tools.description: OCR RG / CNH / CRLV / proof of residence / passport

tools.name: antifraud_score
tools.description: Compute antifraud risk score from KYC + biometrics + device signals

tools.name: signature_get_envelope
tools.description: Get signature envelope status + signer responses

tools.name: onboarding_process_create
tools.description: Kick off orchestrated KYC + biometrics + signature pipeline

tools.name: onboarding_process_get
tools.description: Get status of an onboarding process
